channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: UT System will expand free tuition and fees to all undergraduates whose families make $100,000 or less
item.description: The Board of Regents is lifting the income threshold to expand eligibility across all nine of its UT System campuses.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Kate Mcgee, KPRC 2

item.title: Republicans on the House Ethics Committee reject releasing report on Matt Gaetz
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republicans on the House Ethics Committee voted Wednesday against releasing a report on the panel's long-running investigation into President-elect Donald Trump's nominee for attorney general, former Rep. Matt Gaetz, the top Democrat on the panel said. Rep.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, STEPHEN GROVES and FARNOUSH AMIRI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Jr's abortion 'issue': Senate GOP plans to scrutinize Trump HHS pick's position
item.description: Republican senators have some concerns about Trump's choice of Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to lead the Department of Health and Human Services.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lawmakers are concerned about background checks of Trump's Cabinet picks as red flags surface
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As senators prepare to consider President-elect Donald Trump's picks for his Cabinet, they may be doing so without a well-established staple of the confirmation process: an FBI background check.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, ZEKE MILLER and MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about Matthew Whitaker, Trump’s pick to be America's ambassador to NATO
item.description: Donald Trump has tapped former acting attorney general Matthew Whitaker as U.S. ambassador to NATO, set to make him the nation’s representative to a bedrock Western alliance that the president-elect has repeatedly relished criticizing.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Iran vastly increased nuclear fuel stockpile ahead of Trump return, UN agency finds
item.description: Iran has increased its nearly weapons-grade uranium, a United Nations watchdog found, defying international demands to rein in its nuclear program.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump selects Matthew Whitaker as NATO ambassador
item.description: In a statement, Trump said Whitaker is a "strong warrior and loyal Patriot, who will ensure the United States' interests are advanced and defended.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, NewsNation

item.title: Republicans on Ethics Committee weigh 'unenviable' Gaetz report decision
item.description: Republicans on the House Ethics Committee are barreling into a no-win situation ahead of their expected meeting Wednesday to discuss their report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.), weighing a high-stakes decision that will reverberate throughout Washington.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Trump picks Dr. Oz to run Medicare and Medicaid, Linda McMahon for Education, Lutnick for Commerce
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday tapped billionaire professional wrestling mogul Linda McMahon to be secretary of the Education Department, tasked with overseeing an agency Trump has promised to dismantle. He also selected Dr.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, AMANDA SEITZ, COLLIN BINKLEY and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Someone accessed files said to contain damaging info about Trump AG-nominee Gaetz, lawyer says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An unauthorized person gained access to a file containing confidential testimony from women who have made allegations about former Rep. Matt Gaetz, Donald Trump's pick to become the next attorney general, a lawyer said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minimum wage isn't going up: California votes against Prop 32
item.description: Proposition 32 would have raised the minimum wage for any business with 26 or more employees to $17 an hour immediately -- and raise it once more to $18 an hour starting January 1, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dom McAndrew, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Donald Trump to nominate Dr. Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump plans to nominate former Pennsylvania Senate nominee Dr. Mehmet Oz to serve as the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) Administrator.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, Fox 5

item.title: Manhattan prosecutors ask for additional pause in Trump hush-money criminal case
item.description: Manhattan prosecutors are asking for a further pause in the criminal trial against President-elect Donald Trump in order to give both sides time to weigh the unprecedented nature of the situation.
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo, MPR News

item.title: Trump could 'revoke' China's free trade designation: Moolenaar
item.description: Moolenaar said tightening China's trade capabilities is "in line" with the president-elect's thinking.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Pollster Ann Selzer steps aside in wake of huge Iowa poll miss
item.description: Top pollster Ann Selzer is set to retire from the Des Moines Register’s Iowa Poll after a shocking presidential survey was so wrong.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Whoopi Goldberg called to apologize for saying bakery denied order over politics
item.description: New York City politicians are calling on Whoopi Goldberg to apologize for suggesting on air that a local bakery had declined to make “The View” co-host a batch of desserts for her birthday because of her political beliefs.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump picks Karoline Leavitt to be youngest White House press secretary in history
item.description: Leavitt will be the youngest person to ever hold the job and is expected to deliver press briefings based on Trump’s statement late Friday that he has “utmost confidence she will excel at the podium.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore, MPR News

item.title: Thousands of votes never counted across Nevada due to signature issues
item.description: More than 9,000 mail-in ballots across Nevada were not counted because voters did not verify their signatures before the curing deadline, according to data the 8 News Now Investigators reviewed.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Many Californians would back Kamala Harris for California governor, new poll suggests
item.description: It’s unclear what Vice President Kamala Harris will do after losing the presidential election, but should she run for California governor, support among state residents is seemingly strong, new polling suggests.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5
